title: klasea pusilla
intro: Klasea pusilla, also known as small bitter lettuce, is a type of plant in the Boraginaceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues such as diarrhea and indigestion. The plant has been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and protecting against cell damage. Klasea pusilla can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and its leaves can be used in salads or as a cooking green, although its bitter taste may not be palatable to some.
